best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-updateentry-002 title: failed update entry module: updateentry source pages: 5 preconditions: - data to be updated does not exist test data: - datiaggiornati = [{"id": 999, "name": "nonexistententry"}] test steps: 1. main calls leggidatinseriti. 2. for each dato in datiaggiornati, api_manager calls set(dato). 3. api_manager calls updateentry->tojson(). 4. api_manager sends request(updateentry) to service/need/report. 5. service/need/report returns an error message to api_manager. 6. api_manager sends an error message to main. expected result: - main receives an error message from api_manager indicating failed update.

test case id: tc-dataretrieval-001 title: successful data retrieval module: dataretrieval source pages: 3, 4, 5 preconditions: - listjson contains valid entries test data: - listjson = [{"id": 1, "name": "entry1"}, {"id": 2, "name": "entry2"}] test steps: 1. main sends a listjson request to api_manager. 2. api_manager iterates through the listjson and calls displaylist() on service/need/report for each entry. 3. service/need/report processes each entry and returns a 'done' message to api_manager. 4. api_manager sends a 'done' message to main. expected result: - main receives a 'done' message from api_manager indicating successful data retrieval.
